title: 共同通信杯の後に・先輩を追って

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm baaack! Did you see me cross the finish line?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Welcome back, El! Nice run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa comes back from a great race and
is enveloped in a ring of joyous voices.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I could hear everyone cheering and shouting all
the way on the track!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I felt so inspired, supported—and hella grateful! I
couldn't have done so well without all your
support!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, since you aren't aiming for the Triple
Crown, it doesn't really affect me how well you
do.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've got no problem cheering for ya,
haha.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Sei! Do you hate me that much?!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Laughter echoes through the Tokyo sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spring is arriving soon for El Condor Pasa and her
friends.
choice_data_list: All right, El. Shall we talk about our next race?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A-ah... Sure... Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this stage, we're still feeling things out. The
real problem is what comes next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the moment, our spring schedule lacks any
Classic races. The most enticing options are the
G1 races, but is that our best course of action?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! But your next race is already decided, is
it not?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: One of the three evil generals—Pearl!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That story is still going? The Fan Fest is over...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl. She's one of the older students
that El Condor Pasa's respects the most. She did
an excellent job in the spring of her own classic
year.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If you want to step off the beaten path for your
spring G1 races...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: How about the NHK Mile Cup?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The NHK Mile Cup!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's right. A mile race most captivatingly won
by yours truly.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If you can make a name for yourself there, you'll
be well on your way to becoming a world-class
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A world-class Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, that's what I wanna do! I wanna take on
the NHK Mile Cup!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! Now I've got a big goal set for spring too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This'll be my big race! I'll do just as well, if not
better, than everyone goin' to the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The NHK Mile Cup is a good choice. If you're
looking for a classic-year G1 outside the Triple
Crown or Tiara routes, this is it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she runs like she did today, I'm sure she'll be
fine. We just need to make sure we're fully
prepared.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, now don't take it too lightly. There's
always fierce competition at the NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The competition was extra tough when I ran it.
The track was torn in half by roaring thunder! And
then—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, smash!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think you're laying it on a bit thick? It'd
definitely be canceled if that happened.
Hahaha...
